svg.aria-label: whoami: full-spectrum developer and server operator, founder of UnderNet VPN

text.tspan: > Full-spectrum developer & server operator. I ship Android apps (Java · Kotlin),
Telegram / Discord bots (Python), web apps (React · TypeScript),
Minecraft mods & plugins (NeoForge · Fabric · Paper), desktop tools in C#,
and I run & harden Unix servers.
> Founder of UnderNet VPN — bypass tooling that actually works.
